purpose: PreToolUse hook on Task. Blocks worker dispatches whose prompt is missing required sections. Detects the prompt's TEMPLATE_VERSION marker — non-worker Task calls (research/explore) lack TEMPLATE_VERSION: and pass through. Two template versions: (a) TEMPLATE_VERSION: p_track_v2 — full set, requires 7 sections (YOUR PROGRESS FILE, YOUR TASK ID, YOUR AGENT LABEL, RETURN FORMAT, PROJECT ROOT, TRACKER ROOT, INSTRUCTION MODE); (b) TEMPLATE_VERSION: p_v2 — reduced set, requires 4 (no progress-file fields). Unknown TEMPLATE_VERSION values fail-open (allow). Block message lists every missing section so the master can patch and retry.
gotchas: Detection pivots on the literal string 'TEMPLATE_VERSION:' — research/explore Task calls lack it and pass
p_track_v2 vs p_v2 have different required sets (8 vs 5 originally; 7 vs 4 enforced here — YOUR PROGRESS FILE label was 'YOUR PROGRESS FILE:' specifically)
Unknown template version is fail-open — adding a v3 template requires updating this hook OR clients fall back to allow
Prompt-content grep is plain string match (fixed substring) — section markers must match exactly
conventions: Section markers are uppercase with trailing colon (YOUR PROGRESS FILE:, RETURN FORMAT, PROJECT ROOT:, etc.)
